verdict: PARTIAL PASS — monotonic improvement, no regression, but giveback reduction is 9% not 20%. Recommend deploy + monitor.
deploy_recommendation: Restart Dragon agent to load bootstrapped trail_adjustments from rl_learner.db. Monitor 24h: if giveback_r per symbol shows further reduction in live trades, the RL feedback loop is healthy. Revert if PF drops >10% or DD exceeds 5%.
known_issues: config.SYMBOLS does not include BTCUSD or JPN225ft — RLLearner._load_state silently drops their trail_adjustments on reload. Must fix before live deploy or BTCUSD adjustments will not apply.
Backtest 180d shows identical 90d results for 5 symbols — data files appear to cover ~90d only, so 180d projection is weak.
